{{- $current := . -}}
{{ site.Params.brand }}
{{ range site.Menus.main }} {{- /* External when the URL is absolute (http/https); an explicit `external` menu param overrides either way. */ -}} {{- $external := or (hasPrefix .URL "http://") (hasPrefix .URL "https://") -}} {{- if isset .Params "external" }}{{ $external = .Params.external }}{{ end -}} {{ with .Params.icon }}{{ partial "icon.html" (dict "name" . "class" "cs-nav-ico") }}{{ end }}{{ .Name }}{{ if $external }} ↗{{ end }} {{ end }}
{{ with site.Params.cta_url }} {{ with site.Params.cta_icon }}{{ partial "icon.html" (dict "name" . "class" "cs-btn-ico") }}{{ end }}{{ site.Params.cta_label | default "Get started" }} {{ end }}
{{ partial "lang-switcher.html" . }}
{{- /* Mobile navigation drawer: the top-nav links and (off the home page) the doc-section navigation are hidden on small screens, so surface both here. Lives outside
because the nav's backdrop-filter would otherwise become the containing block for this fixed overlay. */ -}}
{{ i18n "nav_menu" }}
{{ range site.Menus.main }} {{- $external := or (hasPrefix .URL "http://") (hasPrefix .URL "https://") -}} {{- if isset .Params "external" }}{{ $external = .Params.external }}{{ end -}} {{ with .Params.icon }}{{ partial "icon.html" (dict "name" . "class" "cs-nav-ico") }}{{ end }}{{ .Name }}{{ if $external }} ↗{{ end }} {{ end }}
{{ if not $current.IsHome }} {{- /* Same primary-driven fallback as the desktop sidebar. */ -}} {{- $primary := index hugo.Sites 0 -}} {{- $primaryLang := $primary.Language.Lang -}} {{ range (where $primary.Sections "Params.sidebar" "ne" false).ByWeight }} {{- $psec := . -}} {{- $r := partial "i18n-resolve.html" $psec -}} {{- $sec := $r.page -}}
{{ with $sec.Params.icon }}{{ partial "icon.html" (dict "name" . "class" "cs-side-ico") }}{{ end }}{{ $sec.Title }}
{{ $sec.Title }}{{ if $r.fallback }} {{ partial "fallback-tag.html" $primaryLang }}{{ end }} {{ range $psec.Pages.ByWeight }} {{- $rp := partial "i18n-resolve.html" . -}} {{- $pg := $rp.page -}} {{ $pg.Title }}{{ if $rp.fallback }} {{ partial "fallback-tag.html" $primaryLang }}{{ end }} {{ end }}
{{ end }} {{ end }} {{ with site.Params.cta_url }} {{ with site.Params.cta_icon }}{{ partial "icon.html" (dict "name" . "class" "cs-btn-ico") }}{{ end }}{{ site.Params.cta_label | default "Get started" }} ↗ {{ end }}
{{- /* The nav drawer + theme toggle behavior lives in assets/js/theme.js, bundled and deferred in head.html. */ -}}
